headers.description: Preserved raw headers for reference; top-level normalized fields are authoritative.
headers.title: Headers

message_id.description: Canonical Gmail provider message identifier used by downstream phases.
message_id.title: Message Id

part_inventory.description: Legacy alias for MIME part inventory; `mime_parts` is the authoritative Phase 1 handoff field.
part_inventory.title: Part Inventory

provider_message_id.description: Raw Gmail provider message id, distinct from RFC Message-ID headers.
provider_message_id.title: Provider Message Id

provider_thread_id.description: Raw Gmail provider thread id, distinct from the RFC Message-ID header.
provider_thread_id.title: Provider Thread Id

received_at.description: Canonical received timestamp from Gmail metadata.
received_at.title: Received At

rfc_message_id.description: RFC822 Message-ID header preserved separately from provider ids.
rfc_message_id.title: Rfc Message Id

subject.description: Canonical normalized subject derived from Gmail headers.
subject.title: Subject

thread_id.description: Canonical Gmail provider thread identifier for thread-scoped operations.
thread_id.title: Thread Id

action_decision_raw_response_updated_at.title: Action Decision Raw Response Updated At

description: Catalog of node-owned Gmail provider schemas derived from src/providers/gmail/models.py. Reference individual models from $defs.
title: Hexe Email Node Gmail Provider Model Catalog
